title: Puci Eva game
wikitext:
[]: Puci Eva game             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Thu Feb 28, 2008 2:22 am I really don't know what to say: http://www.gametrailers.com/player/31231.html

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Feb 28, 2008 8:32 am とても。。。 かわいい。。。 ふるぐうううううううううううううう

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 28, 2008 1:39 pm Touji is enough off model that it looked like Makoto Ōgami had wandered in from his stint on Ghost Hound.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Thu Feb 28, 2008 3:23 pm :ebichu_mad:

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Thu Feb 28, 2008 3:23 pm The World Domination continues... Now we just need an EVA Wii game

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:33 pm Omg Omg i want this game no i need this game..... may need to learn a bit of Japanese first though lol.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:45 pm ... I have to wonder what Anno thinks about this... Does he shudder in horror, shrug his shoulders, imagine what he'll spend the cash from this on, or buy it and play it for hours on end?

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Thu Feb 28, 2008 6:11 pm cat42 wrote: ... I have to wonder what Anno thinks about this... Does he shudder in horror, shrug his shoulders, imagine what he'll spend the cash from this on, or buy it and play it for hours on end?

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu Feb 28, 2008 8:39 pm He probably would groan at some things, but I like to think he'd find the Ayanamis Rei hilarious. I persoanlly like Eva talking with Zeruel. Incidentially, there's a shot where Shinji is talking to someone that has her(?) eyes blacked out. Anyone know who that is?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Feb 28, 2008 8:54 pm Raise your hand if you saw it coming.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Fri Feb 29, 2008 12:33 am universalperson wrote: Incidentially, there's a shot where Shinji is talking to someone that has her(?) eyes blacked out. Anyone know who that is?

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Feb 29, 2008 7:42 am BobBQ wrote: Raise your hand if you saw it coming.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 08, 2008 10:31 pm What Hunter said. On the EvaStore site for those interested: http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1818&genre=40_software&page=&key=&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0 And for the Akira/Misato/Shinji fan in us all, Misato'S PENDENT!!! http://www.evastore.jp/index.cgi?rm=detail&id=1869&genre=&page=&key=&8%A1%E04=2%A1%DE0

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Mar 09, 2008 12:41 am They're selling cosplayers for 21,000 yen! Yes I know they aren't really, but if they were...

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun Mar 09, 2008 4:23 am are they just using the character models for some silly game? Or is this game even related to the eva universe?

[]:             Quote Post by Furu » Sat Mar 15, 2008 1:50 pm slothen wrote: are they just using the character models for some silly game? Or is this game even related to the eva universe?

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Sat Mar 15, 2008 11:11 pm cat42 wrote: They're selling cosplayers for 21,000 yen! Yes I know they aren't really, but if they were...

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Mon Mar 17, 2008 2:27 pm reagen wrote: Hahaha, first is that 1/1 scale figure...now a cosplayer? Damn!! Well, I know almost any rich fan/perv will buy one if they really do it..

[]:             Quote Post by Lleonard Pler » Thu Apr 10, 2008 5:53 pm I got the "Puchi Eva" game from YesAsia. It's a short game of mini games and very simple puzzles that you solve with the stylus. Nothing special about it besides the chibi characters. It's not in the "Evangelion 2" (PS2/PSP) league, as it's aimed for children, not only because of the graphic style but also because of the vocabulary used and some of the puzzles nature (like adding 1+2, etc). Said that, I absolutely love the redesign of every character. Idol singer Maya and her boyfriend Keel probably are the weirdest thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Apr 11, 2008 1:04 am Lleonard Pler wrote: Idol singer Maya and her boyfriend Keel
